body: Lily came back from your house with a cough that's been going on for a week. Why didn't you take her to the doctor? I have to do everything.
She had a cough for two days, Kevin, not a week. And I monitored it. You always catastrophize. You're not a doctor and neither am I. She didn't have a fever.
You never take anything seriously. This is exactly the problem. I made an appointment for this afternoon. I don't need your permission.
Oh you made an appointment for MY day? You don't get to schedule things during my parenting time without asking. That's in the agreement. Cancel it.
Her health comes before your schedule games. I'm not canceling it. If you actually cared about her you wouldn't be arguing about this.

Do not question whether I care about my daughter. You use her health as a weapon every single time. I'm calling the pediatrician myself and letting them know you're scheduling unauthorized appointments.
Go ahead. Call them. They'll hear that her mother ignored a sick child for a week. I keep records of everything.
So do I. I'm done talking to you today. We can communicate through the app from now on. This conversation is over.
Perfect. Document everything. That's fine with me.
